generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mother and grandmother, I've always believed in strong domestic security. But lately, I've seen how our current laws leave us vulnerable. Just last month in [Redacted City], a lone attacker exploited gaps in our surveillance systems. We can't afford to wait for another tragedy. Expanding domestic security powers isn't about giving up freedoms—it's about protecting our families. Our law enforcement needs the tools to act decisively. #SecurityFirst #ProtectOurFamilies
